name: Yacht-Master 40
description:
The Yacht-Master occupies the space between the Submariner and the Day-Date - it has the robust proportions of a sports watch and the polish of a luxury piece. The bidirectional rotatable bezel with raised platinum-finish numerals gives the watch a tactile quality that is distinct from the Submariner's ceramic unidirectional bezel.

In the Artemis Essential range, this Yacht-Master uses a Miyota Japanese automatic movement and an Oyster bracelet in stainless steel. The silver/rhodium dial sits behind the distinctive bezel, and the overall package reads as one of the most refined sports watches in the Essential catalogue.
descriptionShort: Yacht-Master 40 with silver dial, bidirectional rotatable bezel, and Oyster bracelet.
keyPoints: Bidirectional rotatable bezel with raised numerals
Most refined sports watch in the Essential range
seoTitle: Rolex Yacht-Master 40 Steel Essential | Artemis Watches Montreal
seoDescription: Shop the Yacht-Master 40 Steel at Artemis - Miyota automatic, from $320 CAD. 30-day returns, tracked Canada shipping.
descriptionFr:
Le Yacht-Master occupe l'espace entre la Submariner et la Day-Date - il a les proportions robustes d'une montre sport et le raffinement d'une pièce de luxe. La lunette bidirectionnelle tournante avec chiffres en relief à finition platine donne à la montre une qualité tactile qui la distingue de la lunette céramique unidirectionnelle de la Submariner.

Dans la gamme Essential Artemis, ce Yacht-Master utilise un mouvement automatique japonais Miyota et un bracelet Oyster en acier inoxydable. Le cadran argent/rhodium se trouve derrière la lunette distinctive, et l'ensemble se lit comme l'une des montres sport les plus raffinées du catalogue Essential.
descriptionShortFr: Yacht-Master 40 à cadran argent, lunette bidirectionnelle tournante et bracelet Oyster.
keyPointsFr: Lunette bidirectionnelle tournante avec chiffres en relief
Montre sport la plus raffinée de la gamme Essential
